title: taraxacum minutilobum
intro: Taraxacum minutilobum, also known as Dwarf Dandelion, is a small, perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and alleviate digestive issues. Dwarf Dandelion can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
